reviews.name: Ngoni M.
reviews.appreciated: The creativity poured into every detail — it felt like the studio truly understood the vision.
reviews.recommend: Yes — they know their work and deliver with care.

reviews.name: Michael K.
reviews.appreciated: The attention to detail was incredible. My wedding dress fit perfectly.
reviews.recommend: Yes, 100% — I would recommend Fallot Correction Studio to anyone looking for true craftsmanship.
reviews.comments: Thank you for making such a meaningful day even more special.

reviews.name: Amara D.
reviews.appreciated: Every stitch felt intentional. The silhouette was sculpted to my body in a way I have never experienced before.
reviews.recommend: Absolutely — a true atelier experience from first sketch to final fitting.
reviews.comments: I felt like the most elegant version of myself.

reviews.name: Ife O.
reviews.appreciated: The cut, the structure, the attention to my posture — it was tailoring as architecture, exactly as promised.
reviews.recommend: Without hesitation. A rare studio that listens deeply.

reviews.name: Lerato S.
reviews.appreciated: Coordinating six dresses across different body types was seamless. Each girl felt seen.
reviews.recommend: Yes — for any bride who wants her party to feel as beautiful as she does.
reviews.comments: Communication throughout the process was warm and clear.

reviews.name: Kwame A.
reviews.appreciated: The way heritage and modern tailoring were woven together — I felt rooted and refined at the same time.
reviews.recommend: Yes, deeply. A studio that respects culture and craft.
